Class BackPack

java.lang.Object
fr.uge.BackPack
public class BackPack extends Object
Represents the hero's inventory (Backpack).

The backpack is a grid-based storage system. It handles:

*
  • Placement of items with complex shapes (tetromino-like).
  • Adjacency effects (e.g., weapons buffing each other).
  • Management of gold (merging stacks).
  • Cursed items (which cannot be moved).
  • Grid expansion (leveling up).

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    BackPack()
    Creates a default backpack with 2 expansion spaces.
    BackPack(int spaces)
    Creates a backpack with a specified number of expansion spaces available.

  • Constructor Details

    • BackPack

      public BackPack(int spaces)
      Creates a backpack with a specified number of expansion spaces available.
      Parameters:
      spaces - The number of slots that can be added to the grid later.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if spaces is negative.

    • BackPack

      public BackPack()
      Creates a default backpack with 2 expansion spaces.

  • Method Details

    • addGold

      public boolean addGold(int amount)
      Adds gold to the backpack.

      It first attempts to merge the amount with any existing gold stacks. If no stacks exist or merge is impossible, it places a new pile in the first empty slot.

      Parameters:
      amount - The amount of gold to add.
      Returns:
      true if successful, false if the bag is full and no merge was possible.

    • getCoordinates

      public List<Coordinate> getCoordinates(Coordinate click)
      Returns the list of coordinates for the item at the clicked position. If the slot is empty or invalid, returns just the clicked coordinate.
      Parameters:
      click - The coordinate clicked.
      Returns:
      A list of coordinates occupied by the item at that location.

    • becomeCursed

      public void becomeCursed(Coordinate c)
      Transforms the item at the given coordinate into its cursed version.
      Parameters:
      c - The coordinate of the item.

    • curseRandomItem

      public boolean curseRandomItem()
      Curses a random valid item in the backpack.
      Returns:
      true if an item was cursed, false if no valid targets were found.

    • removeCurseRandomly

      public boolean removeCurseRandomly()
      Removes a curse from a random cursed item (purification event).
      Returns:
      true if an item was cleansed, false if no cursed items existed.

    • applyEffect

      public void applyEffect()
      Triggers the application of passive effects for all items.

      Example: An armor might gain extra protection if placed next to other armor or shields. Weapons might gain damage if adjacent to same-type weapons.

    • take

      public Item take(Coordinate c)
      Removes an item from the backpack at the given coordinate.

      Note: Cursed items cannot be moved or removed.

      Parameters:
      c - The coordinate of the item to take.
      Returns:
      The removed item, or null if the slot was empty/invalid or the item was cursed.

    • add

      public boolean add(Item item, Coordinate click)
      Attempts to add an item to the backpack at the specified origin.

      Checks for space availability, boundary collisions, and handles gold merging automatically.

      Parameters:
      item - The item to add.
      click - The top-left coordinate where the user attempts to place the item.
      Returns:
      true if added successfully, false otherwise (e.g., overlaps or out of bounds).

    • rotate

      public boolean rotate(Coordinate click)
      Attempts to rotate an item at the given coordinate.

      Logic: Temporarily remove item -> Rotate -> Try to add back -> If fail (collision), revert to original state. Cursed items cannot be rotated.

      Parameters:
      click - The coordinate of the item.
      Returns:
      true if rotation was successful.

    • addCurse

      public boolean addCurse(Item curse, Coordinate click)
      Adds a specific "Curse" item (debuff object) to the backpack.

      Unlike normal items, curses are aggressive: they might overwrite existing items (except structural slots) if they land on them.

      Parameters:
      curse - The curse item to add.
      click - The target coordinate.
      Returns:
      true if the curse was applied.

    • useGold

      public boolean useGold(long amount)
      Spends gold from the backpack.
      Parameters:
      amount - The amount to spend.
      Returns:
      true if successful, false if not enough gold available.

    • getGold

      public long getGold()
      Calculates total gold in the backpack.
      Returns:
      Total gold amount.

    • addSlot

      public boolean addSlot(BackPack temp, Coordinate coordinate)
      Expands the backpack grid by unlocking a new slot at the specified coordinate. The new slot must be adjacent to an existing slot.
      Parameters:
      temp - A temporary backpack reference (unused in logic but kept for signature consistency).
      coordinate - The coordinate to unlock.
      Returns:
      true if the slot was successfully added.

    • getPossibleExpansion

      public List<Coordinate> getPossibleExpansion()
      Returns a list of coordinates where a new slot can be added. (Coordinates adjacent to the current grid boundaries).
      Returns:
      List of valid expansion coordinates.

    • price

      public long price()
      Calculates the total value of items in the backpack. Primarily used for scoring purposes.
      Returns:
      The sum of the buying price of all items.

    • spaceUp

      public void spaceUp()

    • getSpace

      public int getSpace()

    • get

      public Item get(Coordinate c)

    • items

      public Map<Coordinate, Item> items()

    • hasCurseableItem

      public boolean hasCurseableItem()

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
